case_metadata.investigating_agency: State Crime Branch & Cyber-Physical Forensic Unit, Pune
case_metadata.summary: Comprehensive multi-module investigation database covering four premeditated murder attempts on Keshan Malhotra by Diya Gupta and Chetany Sharma, culminating in homicide at Lohegaon Hill on June 21, 2026.

digital_footprints: Encrypted WhatsApp voice note packet burst

exhibits.title: Pharmacy CCTV Camera CAM-01 (Sanjivani Medico)
exhibits.description: CCTV footage recorded at 7:00 PM on April 14 showing Chetany Sharma purchasing poison at Sanjivani Medico.

exhibits.title: WhatsApp Dinner Reservation Timestamp (Olive Terrace)
exhibits.description: WhatsApp chat export confirming Diya invited Keshan to dinner at 9:00 PM on April 14.

exhibits.title: Sanjivani Medico UPI Digital Receipt (₹1,450)
exhibits.description: Digital ledger confirming Chetany's UPI transfer to Sanjivani Medico at 7:02 PM on April 14.

exhibits.title: Recovered Unused Dropper Vial (Thallium Solution)
exhibits.description: Poison vial recovered from Audi Q3 glovebox after Diya failed to find opportunity during 9:00 PM dinner.

exhibits.title: Tactical Hunting Knife (Recovered Corridor Exhibit)
exhibits.description: Tactical knife dropped by Chetany while fleeing Room 304 at Skyline Valley Resort after failed attack. Latent prints recovered.

exhibits.title: Resort Deposition Statement - Archita Deshmukh
exhibits.description: Witness testimony from Archita Deshmukh who saw Chetany fleeing Keshan's room corridor dropping the knife at 2:30 AM.

exhibits.title: Skyline Valley Resort CCTV Feed CAM-04
exhibits.description: Resort CCTV footage showing Chetany entering resort perimeter and fleeing room 304 after Keshan stirred.

exhibits.title: Resort Cell Tower & GPS Location Logs
exhibits.description: GSM tower pings placing Chetany's phone at Skyline Valley Resort during the 1:30 AM - 3:00 AM window.

exhibits.title: Pre-Incident CDR Call Logs (Diya & Chetany)
exhibits.description: Call records proving 18 secret phone calls between Diya and Chetany immediately before Chetany's room intrusion.

exhibits.title: HDFC Bank Wire Transfer Records (₹6,000,000)
exhibits.description: Bank transfer trail proving ₹6,000,000 (6 million INR) paid by suspects to hired criminal gang for staging hit-and-run.

exhibits.title: Burner Phone Encrypted Voice Recordings
exhibits.description: Recovered voice recordings between Chetany and hitman Vikram Rathod planning the 10:00 AM office hit-and-run.

exhibits.title: Kharadi Bypass Traffic CCTV Tracking (Tata 407)
exhibits.description: CCTV tracking cargo truck MH-12-QX-4412 accelerating into Keshan outside Apex Tech IT Park at 10:00 AM.

exhibits.title: Impounded Tata 407 Cargo Truck (MH-12-QX-4412)
exhibits.description: Impounded truck used in staged hit-and-run. Front bumper paint transfer matches Keshan's suit fibers.

exhibits.title: Brew & Bean Café CCTV Footage (June 19)
exhibits.description: Café CCTV footage from June 19 recording Diya and Chetany meeting at Table 4 to finalize cliff ambush plan.

exhibits.title: Brew & Bean Order Bill & Digital Payment (June 19)
exhibits.description: Café order bill confirming table seating time and item order during June 19 conspiracy finalization.

exhibits.title: Remington Model 700 Sniper Rifle (EVID-018)
exhibits.description: Sniper rifle retrieved from ravine. Firing pin marks match spent casing; bolt assembly bears Chetany's thumbprint.

exhibits.title: Spent 7.62x51mm Remington Shell Casing
exhibits.description: Spent brass casing recovered 40m northeast on boulder ridge hide at Lohegaon Hill.

exhibits.title: Autopsy & Ballistic Trajectory Report (Dr. Patwardhan)
exhibits.description: Autopsy proving 7.62mm gunshot entry/exit wound preceded the fall from the 45m cliff, refuting selfie fall story.

exhibits.title: 112 Helpline Emergency Call Audio (Diya Gupta)
exhibits.description: Recorded distress call where Diya falsely claimed Keshan accidentally slipped while taking a selfie.

exhibits.title: Cellebrite Cloud Dump - 482 Deleted WhatsApp Voice Notes
exhibits.description: Decrypted iCloud backup containing 482 voice notes between Diya and Chetany detailing all four murder attempts.

witnesses.name: Archita Deshmukh
witnesses.role: Skyline Valley Resort Guest & Key Witness (Attempt 2)
witnesses.verbatim_statement: I was staying in Room 306 at Skyline Valley Resort on May 13 during Keshan Malhotra's birthday party. At around 2:30 AM, I stepped into the corridor to fetch bottled water and saw a man in a dark hoodie fleeing from Room 304 in panic. He accidentally dropped a tactical knife on the carpet and ran toward the emergency stairwell. I later identified him in the police lineup as Chetany Sharma. Resort CCTV confirms his presence.

complete_profile.relationship_to_case: Skyline Valley Resort Guest & Key Witness (Attempt 2)

witnesses.ai_summary: AI Witness Evaluation (WIT-001): Statement provides key eyewitness/expert corroboration matching digital logs and physical evidence.

witnesses.name: Dr. Suresh Kulkarni
witnesses.verbatim_statement: I am making this formal deposition regarding the four criminal attempts on Keshan Malhotra by Diya Gupta and Chetany Sharma. In my official capacity as Owner & Pharmacist, Sanjivani Medico (Attempt 1), I verified physical exhibits, digital location records, financial transfers of ₹6,000,000, and ballistic gunshot trajectory from Lohegaon Hill. The timeline of events across April 14, May 13, June 10, June 19, and June 21 establishes a calculated, multi-phase conspiracy.
witnesses.ai_summary: AI Witness Evaluation (WIT-002): Statement provides key eyewitness/expert corroboration matching digital logs and physical evidence.

witnesses.name: Vikram Rathod
witnesses.verbatim_statement: I am Vikram Rathod. I was hired by Chetany Sharma to stage the hit-and-run outside Keshan's office at 10:00 AM on June 10 using Tata 407 truck MH-12-QX-4412. Chetany promised and wired ₹6,000,000 across multiple bank transfers. He gave me voice instructions via burner phones. I hit Keshan at the pedestrian crossing as instructed.
witnesses.ai_summary: AI Witness Evaluation (WIT-004): Statement provides key eyewitness/expert corroboration matching digital logs and physical evidence.

witnesses.name: Rohan Mehta
witnesses.role: Senior Waiter, Brew & Bean Artisan Café (June 19 Meeting)
witnesses.verbatim_statement: I am Rohan Mehta, supervisor at Brew & Bean Café. On June 19 at around 5:00 PM, Diya Gupta and Chetany Sharma sat at Table 4 for over an hour intensely discussing maps on a smartphone. I served them cold brew coffee and preserved the order receipt. CCTV footage from our cafe clearly records their meeting.

complete_profile.relationship_to_case: Senior Waiter, Brew & Bean Artisan Café (June 19 Meeting)

contradictions.statement: I invited Keshan to dinner at 9:00 PM on April 14 purely to celebrate our upcoming engagement; I never knew Chetany purchased poison at 7:00 PM. [Interrogation Re-assertion #1]

contradictions.statement: During Keshan's birthday at Skyline Resort on May 13, no one entered our room with a knife; Keshan slept peacefully all night. [Interrogation Re-assertion #2]
contradictions.ai_reasoning: AI Refutation Engine: Claim is contradicted by 100% convergent forensic evidence, witness testimony, and digital/financial trail.

contradictions.statement: The 10:00 AM accident outside Keshan's office on June 10 was a random hit-and-run by an unknown driver; we had no involvement or bank transactions. [Interrogation Re-assertion #3]

truth_matrix.absolute_truth: Chetany bought poison at 7:00 PM; Diya hosted dinner at 9:00 PM intending to poison Keshan (failed due to lack of opportunity)
Chetany attempted knife attack in room 304 after Keshan became intoxicated; fled leaving knife (witnessed by Archita)
Staged hit-and-run outside office at 10:00 AM backed by ₹6,000,000 bank transfers to hitman Vikram Rathod
June 19 café plan finalization (CCTV/bills); June 21 sniper gunshot at Lohegaon Hill followed by cliff fall

primary_statutes_violated: Section 302 BNS (Murder - Death Penalty / Life Imprisonment)

module_4_contradiction_matrix_and_refuta.executive_ai_summary: The multi-module investigation into 'The Doomed Triangle' (CASE-2026-DT01) proves with absolute forensic certainty that suspects Diya Gupta and Chetany Sharma conspired across four distinct attempts to murder Keshan Malhotra. From the April 14 poison purchase and 9:00 PM dinner, the May 13 Birthday Resort knife attack witnessed by Archita, the June 10 10:00 AM hit-and-run funded by ₹6,000,000 bank transfers, to the June 19 café meeting and June 21 Lohegaon Hill gunshot and cliff precipitation, every attempt generated mounting digital, financial, physical, and testimonial evidence exposing the conspiracy.
